channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NFL Network host's children rescued from Hurricane Helene destruction by husband with floating raft
item.description: NFL Network host Sara Walsh revealed that she and her family had to experience the destructive floods and winds of Hurricane Helene at their home in Florida.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark officially named WNBA Rookie of the Year after historic season
item.description: After an historic season in which she set numerous records, superstar Caitlin Clark has officially been named the WNBA's Rookie of the Year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: De La Salle vs. NFL Academy: What to know about Bay Area team’s trip to London
item.description: Concord powerhouse De La Salle is set to play its first game outside of the United States on Tuesday against NFL Academy.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Naomi Osaka, 4-time Grand Slam champion, rips fan for calling her a 'fluke'
item.description: Two-time U.S. Open winner Naomi Osaka ripped a fan on social media Thursday for calling her a "fluke," adding that the troll could never compare to her tennis resume.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Augusta chairman confident Masters will go on as club focuses on community recovery from Helene
item.description: Masters chairman Fred Ridley says Augusta National sustained a lot of damage from Hurricane Helene, just like the rest of the area.
item.dc:creator: Doug Ferguson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Simone Biles' post-Olympic tour is helping give men's gymnastics a post-Olympic boost
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Simone Biles simply wanted to mix it up when the gymnastics superstar invited some of the top American men to join her post-Olympic Tour. “Bringing the guys on board was designed to show what men’s gymnastics has to offer,” Biles said.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Utah State Volleyball cancels match against San Jose State, becomes fourth team to do so
item.description: The Utah State women's volleyball team has canceled their Oct. 23 match against San Jose State becoming the fourth team this year to do so, according to reports and tweets from state officials. This comes amid a swirling controversy over a SJSU player's gender.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Mahon, ABC 4

item.title: Bay Area high school football 2024: Week 6 preview, schedule
item.description: Top matchups in Week 6 include Los Gatos at Pittsburg, Riordan at St. Ignatius, Christopher at Santa Teresa, St. Francis at Mitty.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, Christian Babcock, Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Steve Kerr opens up on championship-or-bust culture: ‘This is not a zero-sum game’
item.description: In sharing his opinion on Ringz Culture, the head coach at least partially revealed his thoughts on the Warriors' roster.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Hockey Hall of Famer spreading awareness on heart condition that forced him into early retirement
item.description: Henrik Lundqvist was forced to retire in 2021 due to heart problems. Now he is spreading the word on how people get ahead of the diagnoses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR season hits final 6 weeks under shadow of antitrust lawsuit filed by 2 of its teams
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — In the NASCAR-themed “Days of Thunder” movie, there is a scene where the Big John character modeled after series founder Bill France Sr. threatens a pair of feuding drivers.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hall of Famer Susie Maxwell Berning, a 4-time major champion while raising 2 daughters, dies at 83
item.description: PALM SPRINGS, Calif. (AP) — Susie Maxwell Berning, the three-time U.S. Women's Open winner who was a pioneer as a mother while competing on the LPGA Tour, died Wednesday after a two-year battle with lung cancer. She was 83.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Witt gets another big hit to send the Royals into ALDS with a 2-game sweep of the Orioles
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Bobby Witt Jr. beat out an infield single to drive in the go-ahead run and send the Kansas City Royals into an AL Division Series with a 2-1 victory over the Baltimore Orioles on Wednesday for a two-game sweep of their Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dream fire Tanisha Wright in WNBA's 3rd coach firing since playoffs began
item.description: The Atlanta Dream have fired coach Tanisha Wright after three seasons, the franchise announced Wednesday. Wright took over the team in 2022 and helped them reach the playoffs the last two seasons. The Dream lost both years in the opening round of the postseason, including to New York last month.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tom Brady to announce 49ers-Cardinals game Sunday
item.description: (KRON) -- Tom Brady will announce his first San Francisco 49ers game on Sunday, according to his page on Fox's website. The ex-player considered the Greatest Of All Time by many made the switch to the announcing booth this season.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: High School Boys Golf: Grand Junction shines in regionals, state tournaments set
item.description: This week, the 4A Region 4 tournament took place at Black Canyon Golf Course in Montrose. If we learned anything, it's that the Grand Junction Tigers are for real.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Legendary Dodgers pitcher, broadcaster Fernando Valenzuela hospitalized
item.description: Dodgers broadcaster Fernando Valenzuela has been hospitalized ahead of the team's playoff run. The popular Spanish-language broadcaster and former Dodger star pitcher stepped away from his playcalling duties last week, though no reason was given at the time, according to the Orange County Register.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Sitake wants to keep BYU hungry during bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 34-28 win at Baylor, #17 BYU is 5-0 for the first time in three years. But head coach Kalani Sitake is going to make sure his team keeps its underdog mentality during the bye week. "That's our job," Sitake said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Favre tries to expand his defamation lawsuit against Mississippi auditor over welfare spending
item.description: Favre is not facing criminal charges, but he is among more than three dozen people or businesses the state is suing to try to recover misspent money through the Temporary Assistance for Needy Families program.
item.dc:creator: EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs prep for Falcons in Primetime TNF after big win over Eagles
item.description: After beating the Philadelphia Eagles the Tampa Bay Buccaneers now lead the NFC South with a 3-1 record.
item.dc:creator: C.H., WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mayfield throws for 347 yards and accounts for three TDs to lead Bucs over Eagles 33-16
item.description: Baker Mayfield threw for 347 yards and two touchdowns, while Mike Evans became the Buccaneers' career scoring leader Sunday during Tampa Bay's 33-16 victory over the Philadelphia Eagles.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: More brain injuries will occur from contact sports: Doctor
item.description: Brett Favre's diagnosis with Parkinson's disease has brought discussions of the long-term effects of contact sports on brain function to the fore.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Bears vs. Rams: Injuries, inactives and keys to Sunday's game at Soldier Field
item.description: Los Angeles Rams (1-2) at Chicago Bears (1-2) Sunday, Noon, FOX UPDATE: The Bears just released their list of inactives on X. Inactive for Sunday's game are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Dominique Robinson, DB Terrell Smith, OL Bill Murray and DL Zacch Pickens.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Padres postseason tickets on sale now
item.description: Tickets for 2024 postseason games went on sale to the public on Saturday, with access limited to residents in nearby geographical locations. The Padres still have two games left in the regular season, and fans can watch for free all weekend.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5
